abi: constructor()
event MarketplaceUpdated(address indexed oldMarketplace, address indexed newMarketplace)
event CreditMinted(address indexed to, uint256 indexed projectId, uint256 amount, string tokenURI)
event CreditBurned(address indexed from, uint256 indexed projectId, uint256 amount)
event TokenURIUpdated(uint256 indexed projectId, string tokenURI)
event ProjectBlacklisted(uint256 indexed projectId, string reason)
event ProjectUnblacklisted(uint256 indexed projectId)
event TransferSingle(address indexed operator, address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 id, uint256 value)
event TransferBatch(address indexed operator, address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256[] ids, uint256[] values)
event ApprovalForAll(address indexed account, address indexed operator, bool approved)
function setMarketplace(address _marketplace) external
function mintCredit(address to, uint256 projectId, uint256 amount, string memory tokenURI) external
function burnCredit(address from, uint256 projectId, uint256 amount) external
function setTokenURI(uint256 projectId, string memory tokenURI) external
function blacklistProject(uint256 projectId, string memory reason) external
function unblacklistProject(uint256 projectId) external
function pause() external
function unpause() external
function uri(uint256 projectId) external view returns (string memory)
function balanceOf(address account, uint256 id) external view returns (uint256)
function balanceOfBatch(address[] memory accounts, uint256[] memory ids) external view returns (uint256[] memory)
function setApprovalForAll(address operator, bool approved) external
function isApprovedForAll(address account, address operator) external view returns (bool)
function safeTransferFrom(address from, address to, uint256 id, uint256 amount, bytes memory data) external
function safeBatchTransferFrom(address from, address to, uint256[] memory ids, uint256[] memory amounts, bytes memory data) external
function marketplace() external view returns (address)
function projectBlacklist(uint256) external view returns (bool)
